parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM sessions WHERE connected_at >= $1::timestamptz AND (disconnected_at IS NULL OR disconnected_at >= $1::timestamptz)) AS sessions_active,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM sessions WHERE connected_at >= $1::timestamptz) AS sessions_new,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bytes_in), 0)::bigint FROM sessions WHERE connected_at >= $1::timestamptz) AS bytes_in,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bytes_out), 0)::bigint FROM sessions WHERE connected_at >= $1::timestamptz) AS bytes_out,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM security_events WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz) AS events_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM security_events WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz AND severity = 'high') AS events_high,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM security_events WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz AND severity = 'critical') AS events_critical,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM anomalies WHERE resolved = FALSE) AS anomalies_open,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) FROM (
    SELECT source_ip, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt FROM security_events
    WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz
    GROUP BY source_ip ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5
  ) t) AS top_source_ips;

INSERT INTO pulse_reports (
  period_start, period_end,
  sessions_active, sessions_new, bytes_in, bytes_out,
  events_total, events_high, events_critical, top_source_ips,
  anomalies_open,
  summary, important, reason,
  raw_payload, raw_claude_response,
  model_used, input_tokens, output_tokens
) VALUES (
  $1::timestamptz, $2::timestamptz,
  $3::int, $4::int, $5::bigint, $6::bigint,
  $7::int, $8::int, $9::int, $10::jsonb,
  $11::int,
  $12, $13::boolean, $14,
  $15::jsonb, $16::jsonb,
  $17, $18::int, $19::int
) RETURNING id;
